sections.title: 1. Acceptance
sections.body: By using TrainDart, you agree to these terms.

sections.title: 2. Service
sections.body: We provide performance tracking and AI analysis. Future premium features may be introduced.

sections.title: 3. Security & Bots
sections.body: To prevent abuse, we log IP addresses and technical device identifiers. Automated abuse results in account termination.

sections.title: 4. Ownership
sections.body: You own your stats. You grant us a license to process them for AI reports and tournament results.

sections.title: 1. Data Collected
sections.body: Account data (email), Performance data (throws/matches), and Technical data (IP, browser, device info for security/fraud prevention).

sections.title: 2. Usage
sections.body: We use data to provide services, generate AI reports, and prevent fraud/bot activity.

sections.title: 3. Analytics
sections.body: We use third-party tools (e.g., Google Analytics) to improve the app.

sections.title: 4. Data Sharing
sections.body: We do not sell data. Anonymized data may be shared via API integrations for tournament partners.

sections.title: 5. Your Rights
sections.body: You can request data access or deletion at any time.
